title: Evidence-Based Biomaterials Research: A Practical Guide to Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analysis
description: This article provides a comprehensive guide to evidence-based biomaterials research, a methodology that uses systematic reviews and meta-analysis to translate vast research data into validated scientific evidence. It covers foundational principles, detailed methodological steps for conducting rigorous systematic reviews, strategies for troubleshooting common challenges, and frameworks for validating and comparing evidence across studies.
audience: researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
